title: Morium
description: Boost in performance toward the rendering engine and the feel of high fps.
body:
### *Morium is offically supported on Modrinth*

# **Modpack benefits**

### The performance improvement are huge compared to using only one mod for optimization. Many mods that we use improve the rendering code engine and it makes the game feel smoother. We also added mods make the visual experience more apeling to without remove the vanilla aspects.

 

### ![Performance graph](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a20abd6881e3fd0203cf6441802452c0a3bc85b.png)
 



# Features for the fabric mod loader:

#### - increasing 300-400% in frame rates
#### - Smooter gameplay
#### - Better rendering
#### - Better leaves
#### - Better lighting
#### - Chunks can be rendered more than the server can
#### - better performance with shaders
#### - More customisations in videos settings
#### - 10x less stuttering when chunks are being rendered
#### - And more
